indication: VITRAKVI (larotrectinib) is indicated for the treatment of adult and pediatric patients with solid tumours that have a Neurotrophic Tyrosine Receptor Kinase (NTRK) gene fusion without a known acquired resistance mutation.
description: Health Canada approved larotrectinib for the treatment of adult and pediatric patients with solid tumours that have a Neurotrophic Tyrosine Receptor Kinase (NTRK) gene fusion without a known acquired resistance mutation.

document.name: Vitrakvi (larotrectinib) [product monograph]. HC.
